title: How do you restrict column edit using the create_column in API
excerpt: How do you restrict column edit using the create_column in API? I know there is the defaults object than can be passed in to create_column but how do I restrict column edit using that defaults object?

posts.author: adeutsch (Atticus Deutsch)
